headline: Labor Chief Chavez-DeRemer Leaves Cabinet Amid Investigation
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer is departing her post, becoming the latest member of President Donald Trump’s cabinet to exit as he reshapes his team ahead of midterm elections.Most Read from BloombergTrump Aims to Seal Iran Deal, Says Truce Extension UnlikelyKuwait Declares Further Force Majeure on Oil ShipmentsCruise Ships Seized Brief Hormuz Reopening to Flee Persian GulfApple’s Cook to Hand Reins to Ternus After Record-Setting TenureInside Alex Cooper’s Unwell: Tears, Scre
